## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Operational impact

<!-- Note configuration, permissions, deployment, compatibility, or rollback impact. -->

## Validation

<!-- List the exact checks run and their results. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one issue or operational objective.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior.
- [ ] Shell, Python, TOML, and Markdown checks pass as applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, private repository data, or unsafe command interpolation were added.
- [ ] Documentation and example configuration are updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Breaking changes and release-version impact are identified.
